message:
chore(beads): file 2 [HIGH] beads from review cycle 9 regression

Review cycle 9 workspace test found 2 new test failures introduced by
cod's recent masked-comparator rust-port work (commits 04a14c9,
cbe1cde, 09c5983):

- fnp_python masked_equal rust-port sets fill_value=999999 on int64
  data+int sentinel instead of the expected fill_value=sentinel-value.
  Rust-port code at lib.rs:1176-1180 takes scalar.values()[0] (f64) but
  doesn't cast back to int for integer-dtype inputs.

- fnp_python ma_count_matches_numpy test body uses direct
  .getattr("dtype")? on axis=None results which are Python ints —
  same pattern the assert_array_matches_numpy helper already tolerates
  (fix in commit a61593e), but the test has inline dtype checks that
  slipped past the helper.

Both are regressions from cod's in-flight hswe rust-port activity.
Workspace test: 3723 passed / 2 failed / 1 ignored on cycle-9 HEAD.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
